name: CodePilot
subtitle: Mac coding agent from iPhone
promotionalText: Connect your iPhone to your Mac gateway for beta testing, remote turns, file previews, and local Mac web links.
description:
CodePilot connects your iPhone to a Mac running Codex CLI and the CodePilot gateway, so you can monitor and steer coding-agent work away from your desk.

Use CodePilot to start and follow turns, switch configured accounts, inspect gateway status, preview files, and open local Mac web URLs through the gateway.

This beta is intended for developers who already run Codex CLI, the CodePilot Mac app, and the gateway. You will need a reachable gateway URL and token from your Mac setup. Remote Desktop is excluded from this beta while its paired-device and session-authorization protections are completed.
whatsNew:
See your total remaining Codex credit at a glance with a Live Activity, and use an available reset credit for the account you choose without returning to your Mac.

New:
- Track combined available credit across configured accounts from the Lock Screen and Dynamic Island.
- Use a rate-limit reset credit for a specific account after a clear confirmation.

Improved:
- Clearer gateway recovery when a token is missing, the gateway is offline, or authentication needs attention.
- Better file previews for local paths and Markdown links.
- Clearer account status and turn controls.

Fixed:
- More stable gateway event formatting, turn-state handling, and background-session cleanup.
- More reliable per-account credit refresh and reset state after manual account switches.
